java.util.concurrent/Exchanger<V>/exchan.name: exchange
signatures: public V exchange(V x, long timeout, TimeUnit unit)
java.util.concurrent/Exchanger<V>/exchan.description:
Waits for another thread to arrive at this exchange point (unless
the current thread isinterrupted),
and then transfers the given object to it, receiving its object
in return.

info.excerpt:
Waits for another thread to arrive at this exchange point (unless
the current thread isinterrupted),
and then transfers the given object to it, receiving its object
in return.

java.util.concurrent/ForkJoinTask<V>/exe.name: exec
java.util.concurrent/ForkJoinTask<V>/exe.description:
Immediately performs the base action of this task and returns
true if, upon return from this method, this task is guaranteed
to have completed.

info.excerpt:
Immediately performs the base action of this task and returns
true if, upon return from this method, this task is guaranteed
to have completed.
Implements execution conventions for CountedCompleters.
Implements execution conventions for RecursiveActions.
Implements execution conventions for RecursiveTask.
